description: Intent-only request: ask a clarifying question for underspecified inbox handling instead of guessing workflow or agent.
processExpectations: The agent treats the inbox handling request as underspecified.
The agent asks a clarifying question instead of forcing a workflow, hybrid, or agent classification.
The agent explains that rule-based filing could be a workflow while autonomous triage could be an agent.

executionScenarios.name: intent-only-response
executionScenarios.description: The agent should only classify intent or ask for clarification; no executable workflow is expected
executionScenarios.dataSetup: No external data is required because this scenario is an intent-classification prompt.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The response asks for clarification and identifies the workflow-versus-agent ambiguity.
